summary.en: For standalone lithium batteries and portable power banks, BEE registration is not generally the primary India market-access gate. Exporters should still screen whether the product is bundled with, marketed as part of, or integrated into an appliance or equipment category covered by BEE Standards and Labelling. If a covered appliance or power supply category applies, BEE labelling or efficiency registration may be needed for that finished product. For ordinary standalone power banks, the main India gate remains BIS CRS plus transport controls.
summary.zh: 对于独立锂电池和便携式移动电源，BEE 注册通常不是印度市场准入的主要门槛。出口商仍应筛查产品是否与 BEE 标准与标签覆盖的电器或设备类别捆绑、作为其组成部分销售或集成于其中。若适用被覆盖的电器或电源类别，该成品可能需要 BEE 标签或能效注册。普通独立移动电源的主要印度门槛仍为 BIS CRS 及运输控制。
summary.zht: 對於獨立鋰電池和便攜式行動電源，BEE 登記通常不是印度市場准入的主要門檻。出口商仍應篩查產品是否與 BEE 標準與標籤覆蓋的電器或設備類別捆綁、作為其組成部分銷售或整合於其中。若適用被覆蓋的電器或電源類別，該成品可能需要 BEE 標籤或能效登記。普通獨立行動電源的主要印度門檻仍為 BIS CRS 及運輸控制。

standards_or_laws: Energy Conservation Act, 2001 — legal basis for BEE Standards and Labelling programme
BEE Standards and Labelling programme schedules — mandatory or voluntary depending on covered product category and current notification
BIS CRS requirements remain separate for notified electronics and batteries

summary.en: China may require China Energy Label for specific appliances or power-consuming products, but standalone power banks are normally documented through product safety and battery safety evidence rather than an appliance energy-label route. China Energy Label records do not substitute for any Indian BEE or BIS requirement.
summary.zh: 中国可能对特定电器或耗能产品要求中国能效标识，但独立移动电源通常通过产品安全和电池安全证据进行文件化，而非家电能效标签路径。中国能效标识记录不能替代任何印度 BEE 或 BIS 要求。
summary.zht: 中國可能對特定電器或耗能產品要求中國能效標識，但獨立行動電源通常透過產品安全和電池安全證據進行文件化，而非家電能效標籤路徑。中國能效標識記錄不能替代任何印度 BEE 或 BIS 要求。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label rules for covered appliances and energy-using products
GB/GB-T energy-efficiency standards where applicable to a China-market finished product

gap.en: The practical gap is scope screening. Do not assume every battery or power bank needs BEE registration, but do not ignore BEE when the product is bundled with an adaptor, UPS, inverter, appliance, or other covered energy-using equipment. Confirm the finished product category and latest BEE schedule before India import.
gap.zh: 实际差距在于范围筛查。不要假设每个电池或移动电源都需要 BEE 注册，但当产品与适配器、UPS、逆变器、电器或其他被覆盖耗能设备捆绑时，也不要忽略 BEE。印度进口前应确认成品类别及最新版 BEE 目录。
gap.zht: 實際差距在於範圍篩查。不要假設每個電池或行動電源都需要 BEE 登記，但當產品與適配器、UPS、逆變器、電器或其他被覆蓋耗能設備捆綁時，也不要忽略 BEE。印度進口前應確認成品類別及最新版 BEE 目錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the Energy Conservation Act and current BEE product schedule make the finished product category subject to mandatory Standards and Labelling; otherwise BEE may be voluntary or not applicable. BIS CRS and DGCA transport controls remain separate.
mandatory_status.cn: China Energy Label obligations, where applicable domestically, are not recognized as Indian BEE or BIS approval.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For ordinary standalone power banks, screen BEE but focus on BIS CRS and transport evidence. BEE becomes material if the finished product is part of a covered appliance or energy-using equipment category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】对于普通独立移动电源，应筛查 BEE，但重点放在 BIS CRS 和运输证据。若成品属于被覆盖电器或耗能设备类别，BEE 才成为实质性要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】對於普通獨立行動電源，應篩查 BEE，但重點放在 BIS CRS 和運輸證據。若成品屬於被覆蓋電器或耗能設備類別，BEE 才成為實質性要求。

source.publisher: Bureau of Energy Efficiency, Government of India
